references.hebrew: כִּי־יִתְפֹּ֨שׂ אִ֤ישׁ בְּאָחִיו֙ בֵּ֣ית אָבִ֔יו שִׂמְלָ֣ה לְכָ֔ה קָצִ֖ין תִּֽהְיֶה־לָּ֑נוּ וְהַמַּכְשֵׁלָ֥ה הַזֹּ֖את תַּ֥חַת יָדֶֽךָ׃
references.english:
For should a man seize his brother,dbrother Or “kinsman.”
In whose father’s house there is clothing:eIn whose father’s house there is clothing Emendation yields “His father’s son, saying…”
“Come, be a chief over us,
And let this ruinfruin Meaning of Heb. uncertain. Emendation yields “wound.” be under your care,”

references.hebrew: וְכֹהֵ֗ן כִּֽי־יִקְנֶ֥ה נֶ֙פֶשׁ֙ קִנְיַ֣ן כַּסְפּ֔וֹ ה֖וּא יֹ֣אכַל בּ֑וֹ וִילִ֣יד בֵּית֔וֹ הֵ֖ם יֹאכְל֥וּ בְלַחְמֽוֹ׃
references.english: but a person who is a priest’s property by purchase may eat of them; and those that are born into his household may eat of his food.

commentary_links.hebrew: וְכֹהֵ֗ן כִּֽי־יִקְנֶ֥ה נֶ֙פֶשׁ֙ קִנְיַ֣ן כַּסְפּ֔וֹ ה֖וּא יֹ֣אכַל בּ֑וֹ וִילִ֣יד בֵּית֔וֹ הֵ֖ם יֹאכְל֥וּ בְלַחְמֽוֹ׃
commentary_links.english: but a person who is a priest’s property by purchase may eat of them; and those that are born into his household may eat of his food.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: אינו אוכל תלמוד לומר קנין כספו ויליד ביתו
